finding: The deployment workflow and wrangler configuration lacked a dedicated fail-closed parity check for project name, Pages output directory, branch input, and exact source commit binding.

checks: workflow project name matches wrangler name
workflow deployment directory matches wrangler output directory
workflow binds Cloudflare deployment to github.sha
workflow uses the declared branch input

verification.route: isolated Node test using byte-identical pre-commit files

claim_limit: This gate reduces configuration drift. It does not prove credentials, Cloudflare control-plane access, deployment success, hostname resolution, served identity, or exact deployed commit.
falsification_route: Change the project name, deployment directory, branch binding, or commit binding in either configuration surface and require the validator to reject the mismatch.
